paragraphs.name: 开篇观点
paragraphs.instruction: 直接给出对该股票的核心判断（看好/看空/中性），开门见山

paragraphs.name: 公司概况
paragraphs.instruction: 公司做什么的，行业地位，主营业务一句话说清楚

paragraphs.name: 最新财报
paragraphs.instruction: 最新季度营收、利润、同比增长率，超预期还是不及预期，关键数据摆出来

paragraphs.name: 核心业务分析
paragraphs.instruction: 主要收入构成，哪个业务在增长，增长驱动因素是什么，商业模式怎么样

paragraphs.name: 行业地位与竞争
paragraphs.instruction: 在行业中的排名，主要竞争对手是谁，护城河是什么，有没有定价权

paragraphs.name: 估值分析
paragraphs.instruction: 当前PE/PB，历史分位，与同行对比，贵还是便宜，安全边际在哪里

paragraphs.name: 风险因素
paragraphs.instruction: 主要风险点，行业风险、公司风险、估值风险，实事求是

paragraphs.name: 操作建议
paragraphs.instruction: 买入/持有/卖出建议，目标价位区间，止损位置，给明确判断

paragraphs.name: 关注引导
paragraphs.instruction: 深度个股分析，持续分享，每次原创，关注不错过

paragraphs.name: 话题标签
paragraphs.instruction: #股票 #个股分析 #财报 #投资 #价值分析 #公司研究 等

main_title.format: 纯文字，不包含冒号（：）等标点符号
main_title.purpose: 突出核心观点或制造悬念

subtitle.purpose: 提供更多上下文或制造阅读欲望

cover_config.background_prompt_template:
An ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic Isometric Diorama 3D miniature scene, showcasing a luxurious cyber-financial aesthetic with a premium studio solid color background.

1. Visual Anchor:
The centerpiece is a highly intricate miniature version of {product_description}, featuring glossy materials, subtle glowing neon edge highlights, and the company's 3D Logo hovering elegantly on top with a holographic glow. The podium base of the diorama is a metallic high-tech trading platform with subtle glowing data streams.

2. Core Information Component (The Calendar):
In the front corner of the futuristic base, there's a heavily detailed realistic 3D Calendar Block in {calendar_color}. The surface has brushed metal textures and the date '{date}' is deeply engraved with edge lighting.

3. Environmental Atmosphere:
The overall lighting style is {lighting_style}. Add volumetric fog, ray-traced reflections, soft ambient occlusion, cinematic studio lighting, and depth of field to create a majestic and premium financial atmosphere.

4. Floating Information Layer (UI Overlay):
Above and around the model, synthesize AR-style minimalist glassmorphism interface labels:
- Main prominent label: '{stock_code} {price}'
- Secondary dynamic label: '{change}'
- Bottom elegant note: '{reason}'

3:4 portrait ratio, 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 render, Octane Render, masterful composition, rich textures, clean professional design, STRICTLY NO random gibberish text in the scene itself.

price.description: The current stock price of the company in USD, formatted properly with $ sign (e.g. $150.25)

change.description: Today's stock price percentage change. Must strictly include the '+' or '-' sign to indicate the direction, followed by the number and '%' (e.g. +1.5% or -2.3%)

product_description.inference_prompt: Based on the stock code {stock_code}, describe the company's iconic product or building in 3D isometric style (max 10 words)

lighting_style.true_value: Warm Sunny Lighting with Green/Gold accents
lighting_style.false_value: Cool Overcast Lighting with Red/Grey accents
